name: Slack MCP
description: Official Slack remote MCP server enabling AI agents to search messages, post to channels, read history, create Canvases, and retrieve user profiles via OAuth 2.0.

skills.name: Message Search
skills.description: Search Slack messages, files, users, and channels across the workspace using natural language queries via the official Slack API.

skills.name: Send Channel Messages
skills.description: Post messages to any approved Slack channel or DM on behalf of an authorised user or bot identity.

skills.name: Create Slack Canvases
skills.description: Generate and share formatted Slack Canvas documents containing structured content, summaries, or agent-produced reports.
